scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n site,crm,api -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @agencia-toro/site" "npm run dev -w @agencia-toro/crm" "npm run dev -w @agencia-toro/api"
scripts.build:site: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace=@agencia-toro/site run build
scripts.build:crm: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace=@agencia-toro/crm run build
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace=@agencia-toro/api run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace=@agencia-toro/api run build && npm --workspace=@agencia-toro/crm run build && npm --workspace=@agencia-toro/site run build
